_comment: Deterministic output based on passed/failed fields in checks.

failed.description: Last row inserted more than 4 hours ago

interpretation: Two failures both point to events.page_views: data is 6.2 hours stale (threshold 4h) and volume dropped 41% vs baseline (threshold 30%). This pattern is consistent with a failed ETL pipeline ingesting page view events — not a data definition issue. Check your event ingestion pipeline for errors starting around 01:00 UTC today.
